project_name: LUMA Energy Transmission and Distribution Operation
claim: Under a public-private partnership operation and maintenance agreement LUMA Energy operates the PREPA electricity transmission and distribution system.
Under a public-private partnership agreement Genera PR operates the legacy PREPA power-generation fleet.

project_name: Metropistas Toll Road Concession (PR-22 and PR-5)
lead_entity: Puerto Rico Highways and Transportation Authority
claim: Autopistas Metropolitanas de Puerto Rico holds a long-term toll-road concession over the PR-22 and PR-5 highways under an agreement with the Highways and Transportation Authority.
The PREPA electricity grid reconstruction program addresses post-hurricane recovery of the transmission and distribution system.

lead_entity: Puerto Rico Aqueduct and Sewer Authority
claim: The PRASA capital improvement program funds water and sewer infrastructure across Puerto Rico.
